name: TRAVELERS COMPANIES, INC.
summary: The Travelers Companies, Inc. is a holding company operating through numerous insurance subsidiaries offering property casualty insurance, casualty and surety products, commercial insurance, personal insurance (auto, home, marine), excess and surplus lines, specialty insurance, and reinsurance. It operates in the United States, Canada, United Kingdom, Ireland, Bermuda, and Brazil through entities including The Travelers Indemnity Company, St. Paul Fire and Marine Insurance Company, and Travelers Casualty and Surety Company.

products.name: Property Casualty Insurance
products.description: Insurance coverage for property and casualty risks offered through multiple subsidiaries across the U.S. and internationally.

products.name: Casualty and Surety Insurance
products.description: Casualty and surety bond products offered through Travelers Casualty and Surety Company and related entities.

products.name: Personal Insurance
products.description: Auto and home insurance products offered through Travelers Personal Insurance Company and related subsidiaries.

products.name: Marine Insurance
products.description: Marine insurance coverage provided through The Travelers Home and Marine Insurance Company and Travelers Marine LLC.

products.name: Excess and Surplus Lines Insurance
products.description: Specialty excess and surplus lines coverage offered through Travelers Excess and Surplus Lines Company.

products.name: Commercial Insurance
products.description: Commercial insurance products offered through Travelers Commercial Insurance Company and related subsidiaries.

products.name: Specialty Insurance
products.description: Specialty insurance products offered through Travelers Specialty Insurance Company and Northland Insurance Company.

products.name: Reinsurance
products.description: Reinsurance products offered through Junto Resseguros S.A., a Brazilian affiliate.

products.name: Digital Insurance Platform (Zensurance)
products.description: Canadian digital insurance brokerage platform operated through Zensurance Inc. and Zensurance Brokers Inc.

products.name: Cyber Insurance (Corvus)
products.description: Cyber insurance products and services offered through Corvus Insurance Holdings LLC and related entities.

partnerships.description: Travelers holds a 49.5% interest in Brazilian holding company with subsidiaries Junto Seguros S.A. and Junto Resseguros S.A.
Travelers holds a 49.5% interest in this Brazilian company alongside its Junto Brasil partnership.
